exclusions.outliers: training-only winsorization at 0.5 and 99.5 percentiles; never delete based on outcome
exclusions.unstable_sign_buckets: use frozen naive fallback and report fallback gamma-OI share

hypothesis.statement: After observable volatility, options, liquidity, trend, and calendar controls, higher empirically signed normalized EOD GEX predicts lower next-day absolute return.

pass_fail.rule: All four gates must pass for the primary SPY claim; SPX is a separately reported replication.

placebos.lead_signal: GEX at t+1 predicting target at t must not pass
placebos.timing: No target or forward-return field may enter feature construction

question: Does empirically signed normalized EOD GEX improve next-day absolute-return forecasts beyond observable competing explanations?

signal.as_of: EOD chain at session t; oi_asof_date must be <= t
signal.fallback: Frozen long_call_short_put sign for unstable buckets and DTE > 60; report fallback share

validation.protocol: Expanding annual walk-forward on development data; the prospective holdout remains unopened until a separately registered minimum sample and evaluation date are reached.
